name: Ninkondi
description: With its lightning-fast strikes, the Ninkondi pays respect to the old ways.

components.name: Argon Crystal
components.description:
A Void based radioactive resource that decays every day it is out of the Void.

Location: Missions in the Void

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: With its lightning-fast strikes, the Ninkondi pays respect to the old ways.

components.name: Ferrite
components.description:
Alloy pellets used in Grineer manufacturing.

Location: Mercury, Earth, Lua, Neptune, and the Void

components.name: Plastids
components.description:
A disgusting nanite-infested tissue mass.

Location: Phobos, Saturn, Uranus, Pluto, and Eris

components.name: Polymer Bundle
components.description:
A hard, thermoplastic casing. Manufactured by Corpus.

Location: Mercury, Venus, and Uranus

patchlogs.name: Gara Prime: Update 30.3.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Wukong Prime, Zhuge Prime, and Ninkondi Prime have entered the Vault!
Replaced Perrin Sequence Sacrifice of Ninkondi Prime Handle with Baza Prime Stock.

patchlogs.name: Saint of Altra: Update 25.7.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Pataga Sugatra being unaffected by colour channels when equipped on the Ninkondi or Ninkondi Prime.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.6.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Ninkondi opening and closing in an unusual way when equipped with an attachment in the Arsenal.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.5: Sands of Inaros
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Ninkondi disappearing from the player’s hands when pulled and dragged.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.8.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Ninkondi being unable to do a slide attack.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.7.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Stealth kills from Ninkondi on Corpus MOAs not having any audio.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.5: The Jordas Precept. + Hotfix 17.5.1
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the damage of the Ninkondi in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.4.2
patchlogs.changes: Tweaked the combo animations on the Ninkondi to feel more fluid.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Ninkondi sometimes remaining in a blocking stance when no longer blocking.
Fixed the Ninkondi’s bullet parry animations continuing to play after the parry has ended.
Fixed an issue causing players to crash or lag when blocking before a slide attack with the Ninkondi.
Fixed the Ninkondi remaining closed when interrupting an idle animation to block.
Fixed Ninkondi finishers not immediately closing the weapon after use.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.4.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Ninkondi staying in-hand after a finisher has been used.
Fixed the incorrect finisher animation being used by the Ninkondi.
Fixed building the Nami Skyla rewarding players with the Ninkondi instead.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.4.0
patchlogs.changes:
Ninkondi nunchucks available now!
Bring down the enemy with lightning fast strikes with the Ninkondi. Equip yourself with these electrified nunchucks and pay respect to the old ways.
Add the Ninkondi to your Arsenal by purchasing the Blueprint from the Market today!
